## Tier
2

## Branch
agent/admin-pages-ui-redesign

## Problem
Admin pages (Orders, POS, Packages, Dining Tiers, Menu Sync, Devices) needed presentational redesign aligned with nex-025 brand tokens — UI-only, no backend changes.

## Success Criterion
All six pages render the new layouts; `npm run typecheck`, `npm run lint`, `npm run build` pass; `php artisan test` green; one commit per page on `agent/admin-pages-ui-redesign`.

## Specialist Investigation & Implementation

Investigated existing Inertia pages under `woosoo-nexus/resources/js/pages/`. All pages already used hero sections with `woosoo-accent`; redesign focused on layout swaps per plan:

1. **Orders/Index.vue** — Live tab replaced DataTable with four-column kanban (CONFIRMED/COMPLETED/VOIDED/CANCELLED), summary chips, clickable order cards opening existing `OrderDetailSheet`. History tab keeps DataTable. Echo handlers unchanged.

2. **POS/Index.vue** — Summary chips (Open Tables, Guests Dining), terminal pill tabs, redesigned `PosTableCard` with T-{n}, Open/Closed badge, package/guest/elapsed, 90min progress bar, "+ New Order" on open tables. Sync POS button calls `loadTablesForTerminal`. All dialogs preserved.

3. **Packages/Index.vue** — Card grid with linked menu chip, MEATS {n} CUTS modifier list, two-tab pill nav with [[package-configs]] Dining Tiers link. Form/modals unchanged.

4. **IndexPackageConfigs.vue** — Pill nav polish, tier card density/brand token alignment. Logic unchanged.

5. **IndexTabletCategories.vue** — Numbered handle styling, subtitle already correct.

6. **Devices/Index.vue** — Mockup card grid (TABLE/LAST PING/APP VER/IP, battery bar). Removed security status cell; Restart label on regen action; optional orders stat from `stats` prop when present.

## Code Simplification

code-simplifier applied across all seven touched files:
- Orders: extracted `reloadOrdersFromServer` / `refreshLocalOrdersFromPage`; deduped kanban column counts
- POS: removed redundant `openTablesCount` alias
- PosTableCard: unified elapsed time helper
- Packages: `modifierLabelsByPackageId` computed; direct `menuOptions` usage
- PackageConfigs: `addOnMenus()` helper for side+dessert lists
- TabletCategories: `sortedCategories` computed
- Devices: `deviceStatusTone()` map for status classes
- dead-code-cleanup: PASS — no unused imports or debug artifacts

## Files Changed

- `woosoo-nexus/resources/js/pages/Orders/Index.vue`
- `woosoo-nexus/resources/js/pages/POS/Index.vue`
